creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is not really a portupgrade bug. The problem is that the 
libmusicbrainz and libtunepimp have been removed since they no longer 
function. You will just need to pkg_deinstall -f those packages. Then 
the pkgdb -F should work again. If you have further problems with 
dependencies like this discussing on freebsd-ports@FreeBSD.org may get 
quicker support.
